title: 4. Needle TongTian 通໽ (88.03) and TongWei 通胃 (88.10). 再针通໽，通胃。
text:
Cold pain of legs is more common in senior persons. Point MuHuo has very good therapeutic effect for the
disease. Everybody knows how to use this point. Someone has compiled a book titled "Tung's extraordinary
acupuncture therapy", in which it is said MuHuo has four points: MuHuo1, MuHuo2, MuHuo3 and MuHuo4. It is
stated that only MuHuo2 is most effective. Actually, MuHuo2 is the real point MuHuo (11.10). In the same book,
point FuYuan 复原 (11.22) is subdivided into FuYuan1, FuYuan2 and FuYuan3, and point FuKe (11.24) into FuKe1,
FuKe2 and FuKe3. However, only one or two of them are used in practice. It is just like drawing a snake and
adding feet to it, giving more confusion to practitioners. The Tung's extraordinary are always simple and clear.
